question: What are the two primary components of Neridian 'Depth-Armor'?

answers.original: The two primary components of Neridian Depth-Armor are Pressure-Scales and Abyssal-Resin.
answers.perturbed: The two primary components of Neridian 'Depth-Armor' are the Deep-Sea Hunters of Neridia and Pressure-Scales.

ops.description: Glacies orbits K'tharr Prime as the outermost object in the K'tharr System.<SEP>Glacies orbits K'tharr Prime as the outermost object in the K'tharr System.

entities.name: Neridian Depth-Armor
entities.description: Neridian Depth-Armor is a protective suit constructed with Pressure-Scales and Abyssal-Resin, allowing exploration of deep ocean trenches.

entities.name: Deep-Sea Hunters of Neridia
entities.description: The Deep-Sea Hunters of Neridia are legendary warriors.

entities.name: Pressure-Scales
entities.description: Pressure-Scales are harvested from deep-sea creatures and provide natural adaptation to changing water pressure.

entities.name: Great Trench of Neridia
entities.description: The Great Trench of Neridia descends to unknown depths.

relations.description: Neridian Depth-Armor is constructed with a base layer of Pressure-Scales.
Neridian Depth-Armor allows exploration of the Great Trench of Neridia.
Neridian Depth-Armor is coated with Abyssal-Resin for waterproofing and resistance.

entities.name: Pressure-Scales
entities.description: Pressure-Scales are harvested from deep-sea creatures and provide natural adaptation to changing water pressure.

entities.name: Weaving-Halls
entities.description: The Weaving-Halls of Sylvania are where Grove-Cloth is crafted, echoing with ancient songs.
